title: thelypteris multilineata
intro: Thelypteris multilineata, also known as the Many-lined Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris multilineata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant's fronds and rhizomes are often used to make infusions, teas, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
